2121970.name: Final Recurrence Demo
2121970.description: Final Recurrence is a single-player psychological horror game set in 2001. Your name is Paul Brook, a newbie police officer that is searching for a boy that was kidnapped from his house two years ago. Alex and Gabriel are the two friends that wake you up early in the morning to give you the biggest clue: they identified the car that was driven by the kidnapper and its current location, a small forest called Shepherd's Hill.
2121970.supported_languages:
英语*, 法语, 意大利语, 德语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 波兰语, 罗马尼亚语, 葡萄牙语 - 葡萄牙
*具有完全音频支持的语言
